key_clauses.obligation: 4.5% of gross sales weekly to SFAFT
Strict compliance required; franchisor may modify unilaterally
GL $2M/$4M, WC, Auto $1M, Gold Standard Program
Broad indemnification of franchisor and all affiliates
Personal guaranty by all principal owners
AAA/ADRC in Connecticut; FAA governs; no court litigation; claims only vs. DAL
All franchisee innovations assigned to franchisor; irrevocable power of attorney
De-identify 14 days; assign phone/domain/social; pay lost future royalties; franchisor purchase option at FMV (excluding mark goodwill)
Joint and several liability of all individual signers

exhibits_deferred.reason: Key operative terms already extracted via Item 17 chart and FA parallel provisions. Development-specific terms (schedule, termination triggers) surfaced in Item 17 cross-references.
exhibits_deferred.substance_recovered_elsewhere: Item 17 DA provisions, Item 5 development fees, Item 7 development program costs
exhibits_deferred.remaining_missing: Detailed development schedule penalties, DA-specific default triggers beyond those in Item 17

exhibits_deferred.reason: 49-page MUFA substantially parallel to FA. Key differences are multi-unit management and per-restaurant terms.
exhibits_deferred.substance_recovered_elsewhere: FA clause walk covers operative burdens; Item 17 MUFA cross-references
exhibits_deferred.remaining_missing: MUFA-specific management structure requirements, multi-unit default triggers

exhibits_deferred.reason: 23-page sublease; key rent/occupancy terms surfaced in Items 6/7/10
exhibits_deferred.substance_recovered_elsewhere: Rent ranges, security deposits, guaranty requirements, affiliate profit from spread — all in Items 6, 7, 10
exhibits_deferred.remaining_missing: Specific default/cure provisions under sublease, sublease-specific termination triggers, rent escalation mechanics

exhibits_deferred.reason: Required at renewal and transfer; state addenda restrict its scope. Template form.
exhibits_deferred.substance_recovered_elsewhere: State addenda overrides identified for CA, MD, MN, WA
exhibits_deferred.remaining_missing: Exact scope of claims released; interaction with state franchise law protections
